features: Material:Crafted from high-density, eco-conscious kraft paper, our premium party bags combine sustainability with exceptional durability. The extra-thick material ensures tear-resistant strength while maintaining a lightweight, foldable design for effortless storage and portability

Size: Surprise your loved ones with our exquisitely designed Valentine’s Day gift bag, crafted for meaningful gifting. Measuring 28cm (L) x 10cm (W) x 20cm (H), this medium-sized bag is ideal for holding chocolates, perfumes, jewelry, books, or heartfelt handwritten notes—making it the perfect vessel for your most cherished gestures

Design: Elevate your gifting experience with our sophisticated gift bag, designed to make every present feel extraordinary. With its minimalist yet refined kraft paper design, this bag transforms into a stunning masterpiece when paired with matching tissue paper, a handwritten greeting card, and a silky ribbon bow—adding an instant touch of opulence to your heartfelt gesture

Multiple Uses：Our gift bag is perfect for a variety of occasions and is suitable for boys, girls, children, adult women, and the elderly. It is ideal for packaging birthday gifts, wedding gifts, business gifts, Valentine's Day gifts, Mother's Day gifts, anniversary gifts, New Year's Christmas gifts, Thanksgiving gifts, candies, kraft paper, and more

Package Contents:6 premium paper gift bags with sturdy handles,12 sheets tissue paper,6 blank greeting cards,6 gold ribbon ties,There is no text on the gift bag, you can write your blessing on the bag to express your feelings
